text.message: Red what are you going for here
I can not go for 6 9 if you want to leave sheep port
Do you have a strong preference?
We both have two settles spots
So you’re saying you’ll give me 6-9-12 if I give you sheep port(
Can you see my messages or nah?
And we have the same interest in not having the 8 blocked
Might wanna think about scecuring road
